name: Classic Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Cooked; cubed, peeled Potatoes (5 to 6 medium)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the mayonnaise, vinegar, salt, sugar, and pepper in a bowl.
2. Stir in the cubed potatoes, celery, onion, and chopped eggs until well mixed.
3. Cover the mixture and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to develop.
Makes 5 cups
